# Soft13 Async3 Tool800 Contract

## Soft 13
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.13 with quality bias floor 0.11 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 3
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.03 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 800
tool result budgets default to 800 chars with 15-char previews; Grep head defaults to 60 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/usage vitest
